title: BetterAuth
description: Securely hide passwords in chat and automatically log in to servers.
body:
# 🛡️ BetterAuth

BetterAuth is a client-side Minecraft mod designed to keep your account secure by masking sensitive authentication commands and providing a seamless auto-login manager for your favorite servers.

---

## ✨ Features

* **💬 Chat & Command Masking:** Commands like `/login`, `/register`, or `/changepassword` are automatically hidden in your chat and replaced with asterisks (`***`). This prevents accidental leaks of your passwords while streaming, recording, or taking screenshots!
* **🚫 Safe Command Suggestions:** Stops your sensitive passwords from showing up in the vanilla command suggestion popup.
* **⚡ Auto-Login Manager:** Securely save your credentials per server IP and username. When you join the server, the mod will automatically authenticate you—no more typing!
* **⚙️ In-Game Configuration GUI:** Everything can be configured directly in-game! Press the designated **Keybind** (configurable in Minecraft Controls) to open the BetterAuth menu.
  * Toggle masking, auto-login, and auto-saving on the fly.
  * Manage saved servers, view passwords, or delete entries.
  * Add custom commands to mask for specific servers.
* **🌍 Localization:** Fully translated into **English**, **Ukrainian**, **Russian**, and **Kazakh**.

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the corresponding mod version for your loader.
2. **Fabric only:** Ensure you have the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) installed.
3. Drop the `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.
4. Launch the game and enjoy a more secure chat experience! 🎉

---
